title: After the Kikuka Sho: Just Can't Hack It

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither of them are able to claim victory. Mejiro
Palmer tries to console her, but Mejiro McQueen
sheds tears of frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that, Mejiro Palmer questions whether or
not she herself has that kind of passion for
running.
